# Dr. Zainab Mohsin - Consultant Gynecologist

> MBBS, FCPS (Gynecology & Obstetrics), 10+ years experience in maternal
> health, pregnancy care, and baby care education. Online consultations
> and classes for women across Pakistan and worldwide.

## Classes

- [Pregnancy Week by Week](https://gynae.vercel.app/classes/pregnancy-week-by-week): Trimester-by-trimester guide, symptoms, do's and don'ts, when to call your doctor
- [Safe Delivery Preparation](https://gynae.vercel.app/classes/safe-delivery-preparation): Normal vs C-section prep, pain management, hospital bag checklist
- [Newborn Baby Care 101](https://gynae.vercel.app/classes/newborn-baby-care): Bathing, feeding, cord care, diaper changes, sleep schedules
- [Breastfeeding Masterclass](https://gynae.vercel.app/classes/breastfeeding-masterclass): Latch technique, milk supply, pumping, common problems
- [Postpartum Recovery Guide](https://gynae.vercel.app/classes/postpartum-recovery): Physical healing, mental health, postpartum depression signs, nutrition
- [Baby Growth & Milestones](https://gynae.vercel.app/classes/baby-growth-milestones): 0-12 month development, vaccination schedule, warning signs

## Consultation

- [Book Private Consultation](https://gynae.vercel.app/booking): 1-on-1 private video consultation with Dr. Zainab, PKR 5,000

## About

- [About Dr. Zainab](https://gynae.vercel.app/about): Credentials, experience, philosophy of care
- [Homepage](https://gynae.vercel.app/): Overview of services, classes, and consultation booking
- [FAQ](https://gynae.vercel.app/faq): Common questions about classes, consultations, and booking
